mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bcg_subject WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND subject_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bcg_subject (subject_name, subject_phone, subject_age, create_time) VALUES (#{subjectName}, #{subjectPhone}, #{subjectAge}, sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bcg_subject WHERE id = #{id}
